params.decimals: Decimals of the token (e.g., 6 for USDC/USDT, 18 for DAI)

params.token: Address of the stablecoin to remove

acceptOwnership().notice: Complete ownership transfer (must be called by pending owner)

addStablecoin(address,uint8,string).notice: Add a stablecoin to the registry

isAllowed(address).notice: Check if a stablecoin is allowed

isWhitelisted(address).notice: Alias for isAllowed - implements IStablecoinRegistry interface

removeStablecoin(address).notice: Remove a stablecoin from the registry

tokenDecimals(address).notice: Alias for decimalsOf - implements IStablecoinRegistry interface

@notice Remove a stablecoin from the registry
 @param token Address of the stablecoin to remove
